# uninstall

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `uninstall`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `uninstall` | `boolean` | Whether to set up a minimal configuration that will remove all managed files and packages. Use this with extreme care since running the generated activation script will remove all Home Manager state from your user environment. This includes removing all your historic Home Manager generations. |
